name: Sync Issues
sequence: Sync sprint-status.yaml entries to GitLab/GitHub Issues — create missing issues, reconcile statuses, manage labels.
column17: Reads issue_tracking.platform from bmm/config.yaml to pick glab or gh CLI. Issue-tracker-first with file-system fallback.

name: Link MRs/PRs
sequence: Retroactively link merged Merge Requests or Pull Requests to their corresponding issues.
column17: Three-tier matching: pattern, AI context, manual. Platform-agnostic — reads config to pick glab or gh.

name: Issue Tracking Setup
sequence: One-time setup: apply TOML overrides, patches, and configure platform.
column17: Run after installing the module. Applies integration patches to BMM workflows and configures platform.
